creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that kib@ intentionally removed FFS from amd64's MINIMAL config (and it seems his change wasn't mirrored to i386 MINIMAL) after kib@ did work to make ufs.ko fully functional:

commit 0c1c5e36ebbb7e30a5e57a044a20ea2c4f7cf793
Author: Konstantin Belousov <kib@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Sat May 6 23:02:34 2023 +0300

    amd64 MINIMAL: remove UFS from compiled-in list
    
    Reviewed by:    emaste, imp
    Sponsored by:   The FreeBSD Foundation
    MFC after:      1 week
    Differential revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D39990
